title: alyssum luteolum
intro: Alyssum luteolum, also known as yellow alyssum or white alyssum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is known for its small, white or yellow flowers and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including colds, coughs, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant properties and its ability to ease congestion. Alyssum luteolum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote relaxation and relieve respiratory issues.
